TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment or no LTSS) 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable using the DE Disability and Need Supplemental file; we count each month 
where the LTSS_LVL_CD_1_MM ne ' ' (i.e., count any month that has a populated value). Note that the 
LTSS level source variable from DE identifies three levels of care: skilled, intermediate, and custodial
